description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python tests that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-22.04 job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies with make ce, run static checks with make static-checks, and execute tests with make test.
